items.title: Tally Empanelment Certificate Awarded
items.description: FA received official Tally empanelment certification, recognising our Tally training program as meeting national standards for professional software education.

items.title: FABLE — FA's New Learning Platform Launched
items.description: Launch of FABLE, FA's structured learning framework that combines classroom excellence with digital resources, enabling students to access notes and practice tests from anywhere.

items.title: AMBI-LEARN Sanskrit Initiative
items.description: FA launched the AMBI-LEARN Sanskrit program as part of its commitment to holistic education — connecting students to India's intellectual heritage alongside professional finance training.

items.title: Authors Day Celebrations
items.description: FA celebrated Authors Day recognising the in-house publication efforts of faculty who have authored original study materials used by students across all programs.
